name: UK Gambling Commission
statistical_standard: NIST SP 800-22 (via UKGC Remote Technical Standards)
approved_labs_note: GLI and BMM Testlabs operate under the same parent company as of 2022; whichever appears on the approved list is the relevant authority. Labs must be UKAS-accredited or equivalent.
notes: UKGC sets no fixed minimum RTP floor. The key requirement is that empirical RTP falls within the 95% CI of the declared theoretical RTP. Lab accreditation standard is ISO/IEC 17025 (testing and calibration laboratories), accredited by UKAS or equivalent. Methodology alignment with UKGC RTS is the primary compliance focus.
